name: Zonules.com Language Layer Registry
doctrine: No Partial Language Doctrine: a language layer is exposed publicly (sitemap, hreflang, navigation) only when status == 'launched'. A registered but incomplete layer is 'blocked' and must never appear in public output.

layers.name: English
layers.role: Primary scientific, technical, institutional, and global reference layer.

layers.name: French
layers.role: Francophone scientific, medical, philosophical, educational, and AI reference layer.
launch_requirements: Complete core reference units for all three layers
Correct reciprocal hreflang with the English layer
Translated medical-safety, source, and acquisition language
Localized terminology reviewed for scientific meaning
Quality gate pass for the fr layer
layers.note: Registered to reserve the architecture. Blocked from all public output until every launch requirement is met. Beginning a layer means registering and governing it — not exposing it partially.
